name: CID-10 Brasil MCP
description: MCP server for the Brazilian CID-10 (DATASUS V2008) - search, look up, validate and browse ICD-10 codes in Portuguese, fully offline from a bundled dataset.
author: Sidney Bissoli

tools.name: cid10_search
tools.description: Search CID-10 codes by term (code or description) in the Brazilian DATASUS table; accepts partial codes and free text.

tools.name: cid10_lookup
tools.description: Look up one CID-10 code: full description, sex restriction, cause-of-death flag, dagger/asterisk classification.

tools.name: cid10_hierarchy
tools.description: Return all CID-10 codes under a category/prefix (e.g. E11 returns all type-2 diabetes subcategories).

tools.name: cid10_capitulos
tools.description: List all 22 chapters of the Brazilian CID-10.

tools.name: cid10_stats
tools.description: Return general statistics about the loaded CID-10 database.

tools.name: cid10_validar
tools.description: Validate whether a CID-10 code exists and is usable in health systems (AIH, APAC, SIM, etc.).

resources.name: capitulos
resources.description: The 22 chapters of the Brazilian CID-10 (DATASUS V2008) with code ranges and descriptions.

resources.name: estatisticas
resources.description: Metadata and statistics of the loaded CID-10 dataset (version, source, counts).

prompts.name: buscar_diagnostico
prompts.description: Find the most appropriate CID-10 code for a diagnosis, symptom or clinical term, with chapter/group context.

prompts.name: explorar_categoria
prompts.description: List and summarize all CID-10 subcategories under a category/prefix.
